initiatives.name: East Michigan Environmental Action Council (EMEAC)
initiatives.description: A Black-led environmental justice organization building community power through mutual aid, youth organizing, and environmental education. Based at the Cass Corridor Commons, they work to cultivate sustainable communities through food sovereignty, climate justice, and intergenerational leadership development.

initiatives.name: Petty Propolis
initiatives.description: Organization leveraging poetry, literacy workshops, and political education to pursue racial and environmental justice through community-centered initiatives.

initiatives.name: Detroit Safety Team
initiatives.description: The Detroit Safety Team (DST) is a Detroit-focused organization dedicated to assisting communities in building a new safety infrastructure that shifts away from police reliance.

initiatives.name: Metro Detroit SURJ
initiatives.description: Metro Detroit chapter of the national group, Showing Up for Racial Justice (SURJ) standing up against white supremacy and for racial justice.

initiatives.name: Detroit Tenants Association
initiatives.description: We are led by tenants and supported by allies in our mission to empower tenants through advocacy, unity, education, and direct collective action.

initiatives.name: The Seward Sharing Table
initiatives.description: Hosted by TANCPM🏢 In New Center Detroit on Seward Ave just west of 2nd Ave. An outdoor, free community food pantry available 24/7 for anyone in need.

initiatives.name: Detroit Eviction Defense
initiatives.description: Coalition of tenants & homeowners united in the struggle against foreclosure & eviction. Meeting Thursdays at 6pm 2120 Russell.

initiatives.name: Michigan Mutual Aid Coalition - MIMAC
initiatives.description: Building dual power through Mutual Aid in Metro Detroit. DM if interested in volunteering for grocery deliveries. Donations are welcome!

initiatives.name: 313 Care Collective
initiatives.description: Antifascist street medics and action safety team

initiatives.name: Trumbullplex
initiatives.description: Collective owned & led micro-community, anti-gentrification project & cultural hub located in Wawiyaatanong (Detroit).

initiatives.name: Hey Yall Detroit
initiatives.description: Providing the resources & tools needed to stimulate & influence residents of the disenfranchised communities of Detroit.

initiatives.name: Source Booksellers
initiatives.description: An independent bookstore fostering mutual aid and community power through literature and cultural programming in Detroit. They coordinate book access, educational events, and solidarity networks while building power through non-fiction focused community education, Black literature, and creating spaces for learning and movement building.

initiatives.name: Amplify Palestine MI
initiatives.description: A page dedicated to amplifying our community’s collective struggle towards liberation

initiatives.name: Urban Praxis Workshop
initiatives.description: We make tools, process data, provide training, and organize research that is driven by questions that come from daily life and lived experience.

initiatives.name: Community Movement Builders
initiatives.description: We’re a collective of black people creating self-determining communities by organizing & cooperative economics.

initiatives.name:
Nuii Waav
              Brotherhood
initiatives.description: Nuii Waav Brotherhood was created to meet a critical need in our community for a safe and welcoming space for transgender men and other transmasculine folks.

initiatives.name: Detroit Will Breathe
initiatives.description: A militant organization formed in the streets of Detroit in the midst of an international movement against police brutality.

initiatives.name:
Detroit Food Not Bombs and Food Not Class
              Collective
initiatives.description: sharing hot meals and free groceries and supplies etc every weds at cass park

initiatives.name: We the People of Detroit
initiatives.description: Fighting for the human right to clean, safe, and affordable water.
